prestazioni: L15B7 1.5L Turbo (Direct Injection) - Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch downpipe by HKS, and GReddy Profec E-01 electronic boost controller for 280+ HP (stock internals, 22 PSI max boost)
K-Tuned L15B7-specific intake manifold with port-matched throttle body and ID1000 fuel injectors, paired with a Hondata FlashPro ECU tune optimized for E85 flex-fuel (30% ethanol blend)
Full suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (HR-V-specific valving), Whiteline 24mm rear sway bar, and Cusco front strut tower bar for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS HR-V RS widebody kit (front/rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with custom matte gunmetal paint (Gunmetal Grey Metallic by PPG)
J's Racing carbon fiber hood (L15B7-specific cutouts) with integrated hood pins and a custom front splitter by Seibon Carbon for aggressive aero balance

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 18x9.5 +35 wheels with 245/40R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with D2 Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear big brake kit (356mm rotors) and custom red caliper paint (Honda Racing Red)
